html:
Exclusive to:

The Inspectacles is a character exclusive item that can be crafted and used only by Winona with the Founder's Keepers I skill.

When equipped, the player will see blue radio waves on the borders of the screen. The waves show the direction of a nearby Cachebox. The Cachebox can be broken or fixed form. If the Cachebox is broken, the player needs to complete a mini-game to repair it. After opening, a Cachebox will drop some items that can be used for new crafts or getting new recipes. A new Cachebox will appear after half day.

With the Founder's Keepers II skill, there is 25% chance that the player will find Advanced Cacheboxes with 75% chance for Cacheboxes.

The Inspectacles can only be used on the Surface server, and cannot be used in the Caves.

Tips

  • The Inspectacles's light will illuminate when it is ready to use, but it only lights up when in inventory or equipped. Its light will not turn on when placed on the ground or in the Backpack.

Gallery

  • Removed from beta Inspectacles inventory texture when it found Cachebox
  • Removed from beta Inspectacles inventory texture when it was close to Cachebox
  • Removed from beta Inspectacles inventory texture when it is inactive
  • Inspectacles concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Inspectacles Waves concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Inspectacles Equipped.

“Winona always struck me as someone with a vision for the future.”
–Wilson
“I wasn't paying attention when Winona told me how it works.”
–Willow

–Wolfgang
“They can't show me what I'm looking for.”
–Wendy
“I WISH I COULD SEE THE OLD MAN'S FACE WHEN HE FINDS THOSE EMPTY CACHES”
–WX-78
“It seems to utilize radio waves to pinpoint the location of anomalous objects.”
–Wickerbottom
“Wonder what Winona sees in them.”
–Woodie
“How long has that old fool been hiding his trash here?!”
–Maxwell
“A warriör hath nö need för such things.”
–Wigfrid
“Winona's been using those funny glasses a lot lately.”
–Webber

–Warly
“Funny eye hat”
–Wormwood
“Now I can track down the bossman's loot!”
–Winona
“She's made the decision to follow his vision?”
–Wortox
“Weenowna-lady Ironfolk eyes!”
–Wurt
“Winona's been using them to find lots of neat stuff!”
–Walter
“It seems to be locked onto a very particular temporal wavelength.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thanh tra là một vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật mà chỉ Winona mới có thể chế tạo và sử dụng với kỹ năng Người canh giữ của Người sáng lập I.

The '''Inspectacles''' is a character exclusive item that can be crafted and used only by [[Winona]] with the [[Founder's Keepers I]] skill.

When equipped, the player will see blue radio waves on the borders of the screen. The waves show the direction of a nearby [[Cachebox]]. The Cachebox can be broken or fixed form. If the Cachebox is broken, the player needs to complete a mini-game to repair it. After opening, a Cachebox will drop some items that can be used for new crafts or getting new recipes. A new Cachebox will appear after half day. 

With the {{PicDark|32|Founder's Keepers II}}[[Founder's Keepers II]] skill, there is 25% chance that the player will find [[Advanced Cachebox]]es with 75% chance for Cacheboxes. 

The Inspectacles can only be used on the Surface server, and cannot be used in the Caves.
{{clear}}

== {{Tips}} Tips ==
*The Inspectacles's light will illuminate when it is ready to use, but it only lights up when in inventory or equipped. Its light will not turn on when placed on the ground or in the Backpack.
